name: Thanksgiving Orange Pumpkin Apple Cake
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Grated Orange (including juice and peel)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C). For gift-giving, prepare this cake in 4 mini-loaf foil pans measuring 6x3x2 inches.
2. Cream together the butter and sugar until smooth.
3. Beat in the eggs one at a time until well combined.
4. Gradually add the grated orange, apples, and canned pumpkin, mixing until just incorporated.
5. In a separate bowl, whisk together the flour, baking powder, baking soda, and pumpkin pie spice.
6. Add the dry ingredients to the butter mixture alternately with milk (or another liquid), stirring after each addition until all is combined.
7. Stir in the chopped walnuts.
8. Grease a 10-inch tube pan and pour the batter into it.
9. Sprinkle the top with walnuts, pressing them lightly into the batter.
10. Bake for about 40-45 minutes, or until a cake tester inserted in the center comes out clean.
11. Allow the cake to cool in the pan before removing and serving. Serves 10.
